name: purple
description: Open-source terminal SSH manager and SSH config editor. Exposes purple's MCP server to Claude Desktop in read-only mode: list_hosts, get_host and list_containers. Reads ~/.ssh/config, syncs from 16 cloud providers.
long_description:
An open-source terminal SSH manager and SSH config editor for macOS and Linux. A fast Rust TUI that searches hundreds of hosts, syncs from 16 clouds including AWS, GCP, Azure, Hetzner, Proxmox and OCI, transfers files, manages Docker and Podman over SSH, signs short-lived HashiCorp Vault SSH certificates and exposes an MCP server for AI agents. Edits ~/.ssh/config with round-trip fidelity. Single binary. MIT licensed.

This bundle exposes purple's MCP server to Claude Desktop in read-only mode. Three tools are available: list_hosts, get_host and list_containers. State-changing tools (run_command, container_action) are disabled. Every tool call is appended to ~/.purple/mcp-audit.log (mode 0o600, JSON Lines, run_command body redacted).

For shell access on remote hosts via Claude Desktop, install purple via Homebrew or cargo and configure claude_desktop_config.json directly without --read-only.

tools.name: list_hosts
tools.description: List every SSH host defined in the user's SSH config, including alias, hostname, user, port and tags.

tools.name: get_host
tools.description: Return full details for a single SSH host by alias: hostname, user, port, identity files, ProxyJump and tags.

tools.name: list_containers
tools.description: List Docker and Podman containers running on a remote SSH host. Requires container runtime on the target host.

ssh_config.title: SSH config file
ssh_config.description: Path to your SSH config. purple reads hosts from this file.

audit_log.title: Audit log path
audit_log.description: Append-only JSON Lines log of every MCP tool call.
